prompt:
FIXED foreground subject: the woman and everything she is wearing. In the source image she stands on a plain white studio backdrop — remove that backdrop completely and replace it with the new scene described below, but treat HER as a locked, unedited layer. Do NOT regenerate, restyle, relight, or reshape her face, body, hair, skin tone, dress, print, or footwear. Preserve exactly: warm tan skin; long dark-brown centre-parted hair past the shoulders; relaxed expression; arms loose at her sides; a sleeveless ivory/cream tiered cotton midi dress in a tiny pink-and-sage ditsy floral print, scooped neckline with a small self-tie bow at the chest, shirred waist, lace-trim band on the lower tier; a fine gold chain; low pearl-embellished clear sandals. Generate ONLY a new photographic background. Match the new scene's light to her existing soft, even, warm frontal lighting — open shade, gentle and diffused, no harsh backlight, no hard new shadows across her, a natural grounded contact shadow at her feet.

BACKGROUND: A warm apricot-cream limewashed wall in open shade with a faint brushy patina. To camera-right, a low arched timber doorway painted a soft faded green, standing slightly ajar onto interior shadow. At the base of the wall, one aged terracotta pot holding a sprig of rosemary; a worn stone doorstep below. A real Mediterranean house front, calm and deliberate.

FRAMING: vertical portrait, about 2:3. Full figure centred, filling roughly 88% of frame height, a little ground beneath her sandals and slight headroom above. Eye-level camera, ~35-50mm look, medium depth of field so the background reads clearly but sits softly behind her.
